mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, gender, birthday, status, account_type, salt, last_login_time, last_login_ip, login_count, failed_login_attempts, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, remark, last_active_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET last_login_time = NOW(), last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, login_count = login_count + 1, failed_login_attempts = 0, last_active_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}

UPDATE user SET failed_login_attempts = failed_login_attempts + 1, locked_until = CASE WHEN failed_login_attempts + 1 >= 5 THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) ELSE locked_until END WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET failed_login_attempts = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY last_active_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM user WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET email_verified = 1, activation_token = NULL, token_expire_time = NULL WHERE id = #{userId}

UPDATE user
nickname = #{user.nickname}, avatar = #{user.avatar}, gender = #{user.gender}, birthday = #{user.birthday}, real_name = #{user.realName}, id_card = #{user.idCard}, address = #{user.address}, province = #{user.province}, city = #{user.city}, district = #{user.district}, occupation = #{user.occupation}, company = #{user.company},
WHERE id = #{user.id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
